mapper.insert: INSERT INTO job_analysis (application_case_id, job_posting_id, job_posting_revision, employment_type, experience_level, required_skills, preferred_skills, duties, qualifications, difficulty, summary, evidence, ambiguous_conditions) VALUES (#{applicationCaseId}, #{jobPostingId}, #{jobPostingRevision}, #{employmentType}, #{experienceLevel}, #{requiredSkills}, #{preferredSkills}, #{duties}, #{qualifications}, #{difficulty}, #{summary}, #{evidence}, #{ambiguousConditions})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM job_analysis WHERE application_case_id = #{applicationCaseId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM job_analysis WHERE application_case_id = #{applicationCaseId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE job_analysis SET employment_type = #{employmentType}, experience_level = #{experienceLevel}, required_skills = #{requiredSkills}, preferred_skills = #{preferredSkills}, duties = #{duties}, qualifications = #{qualifications}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, summary = #{summary}, evidence = #{evidence}, ambiguous_conditions = #{ambiguousConditions}, confirmed_at = #{confirmedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND application_case_id = #{applicationCaseId}
